name: Finn JRPG
short_description: Turn-based traditional RPG in a low fantasy setting. Grind mobs for gold and gear in a setting based on old Finnish mythology.
detailed_description:
Turn-based traditional RPG in a low fantasy setting.
Grind mobs for gold and gear in a setting based on old Finnish mythology, then upgrade your party to advance to stronger areas.
Defeat monsters, then invest gold in stores to upgrade your characters to be able to defeat stronger monsters.
Zero instances of downtime between player inputs and gameplay for the entire duration of the game, optimal for casual play as well as speedrunning.
Fully playable with Controllers and Steam Deck.

Created by a single developer on a shoe-string budget.

All source code available under AGPL license at:
https://github.com/anttijuo/CrowningReverie
